title: Pvt Ltd Registration in Kolkata | Virtual Auditor

bodyText:
What is private limited company registration? Private limited company registration under Companies Act 2013. SPICe+ filing, DSC, DIN, MOA/AOA, PAN/TAN.
Private Limited Company Registration is a professional service offered by Virtual Auditor, an AI-powered CA and IBBI Registered Valuer firm (IBBI/RV/03/2019/12333) led by CA V. Viswanathan (FCA, ACS, CFE, IBBI RV), serving clients in Kolkata, West Bengal since 2012.
Quick Answer: Pvt Ltd Registration in Kolkata — Private limited company registration under Companies Act 2013. SPICe+ filing, DSC, DIN, MOA/AOA, PAN. From ₹8,999. Contact +91 99622 60333.

HEADING2: Private Limited Company Registration in Kolkata
Virtual Auditor provides private limited company registration in Kolkata, West Bengal. Eastern India's commercial capital. Our multi-credential practice (FCA, ACS, CFE, IBBI RV) ensures comprehensive professional service delivery.
ROC jurisdiction: ROC Kolkata. Pincode: 700001.

HEADING2: Frequently Asked Questions

faqs.q: How much does Pvt Ltd registration cost?
faqs.a: All-inclusive from ₹8,999 covering government fees, DSC, DIN, SPICe+ filing, MOA/AOA, PAN/TAN. No hidden charges. 5-15 working days.

faqs.q: What documents are needed for company registration?
faqs.a: PAN & Aadhaar of directors, address proof, passport-size photos, registered office address proof (utility bill + NOC/rent agreement), and proposed company name.

faqs.q: How long does company registration take?
faqs.a: 5-15 working days from document submission. Same-day DSC issuance, 2-3 days for name approval, 3-7 days for incorporation certificate.

faqs.q: Do you provide pvt ltd registration in Kolkata?
faqs.a: Yes. Virtual Auditor serves clients in Kolkata, West Bengal. Eastern India's commercial capital. Contact +91 99622 60333 for a free consultation.

faqs.q: What is the nearest Virtual Auditor office to Kolkata?
faqs.a: Our nearest office depends on your location. Chennai (HQ): Spencer Plaza, Anna Salai. Bangalore: MG Road. Mumbai: Goregaon West. All services available remotely for Kolkata clients.

faqs.q: How do I get started with pvt ltd registration in Kolkata?
faqs.a: Call +91 99622 60333 or WhatsApp us. Free 30-minute consultation. We handle the complete process for Kolkata businesses with no location surcharges.
